tags.description: The North River Checking Station offers the only potable water along the Tellico River Corridor. Sanitary RV Dump Station is also available at this site.

tags.note: This feature appears to have been severely damages (downed tree on top) in the Dec 2023 tornado. It appears from imagery to have been no longer in use, since no paths led to it.
